final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: e-commerce hero banner for Tmall homepage
Primary request: luxury serum bottle floating among pink petals and water droplets
Scene/backdrop: soft gradient pink-to-purple background, dreamy ethereal atmosphere
Subject: premium glass serum bottle with gold cap, elegant minimalist design, suspended in mid-air
Style/medium: high-end commercial photography with 3D rendering aesthetic
Composition/framing: centered hero shot, ample negative space for text overlay, wide banner format
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, glowing highlights on glass and droplets, luxurious and dreamy mood
Color palette: soft pink, lavender purple, rose gold accents, pearlescent whites
Materials/textures: transparent glass with liquid refraction, silky smooth petals, crystal-clear water droplets with caustic light effects
Constraints: maintain luxury brand aesthetic suitable for premium beauty campaign, keep bottle as clear focal point
Avoid: harsh shadows, cluttered composition, plastic-looking materials, watermark, text overlay
